subject: We miss you on OpenAgenda!
content:
Hello dear user,

We see that your account has been inactive for more than 7 days, as you have not created an agenda or contributed an event since it was created. Do you need a helping hand?

**Are you organizing events and would like to create an agenda?**
Log in to your account and [create an agenda](https://openagenda.com/agendas/new) dedicated to your organization.
Set up the contribution modes for your agenda (who can publish events and whether you would like to enable **moderation** for event submissions). 
Don’t worry, you can always come back and change your settings if you change your mind.

Find all the useful information on [our website](https://openagenda.com/fr/p/offres-organisateurs).

**Would you like to contribute to an existing agenda?**
OpenAgenda is **used by many organizations** to list and share event announcements from a wide range of organizers. **Identify the agenda of the initiative you would like to contribute to** using the [agenda search](https://openagenda.com/agendas).
